focus: architectural baseline: code-graph edge inventory + skill-advisor freshness/scorer/promotion

label: 10 edge types declared in indexer-types.ts and all 10 emitted by structural-indexer.ts
CALLS edges are the sole regex-heuristic edge type (detectorProvenance='heuristic', evidenceClass='INFERRED'); all 9 other edge types are AST-EXTRACTED

GraphEdgeEvidenceSummaryClass has only 5 categories (import/type_reference/test_coverage/inferred_heuristic/direct_call) and persists a single numericConfidence scalar; no per-edge-type coverage is stored
Freshness machine produces 5 states (live/stale/absent/unavailable + recovered-downgrade path), not 4 as topic documented; fallbackMode (sqlite/json/none) is orthogonal to state
missing-source ⇒ state='absent' regardless of artifact presence
JSON-only fallback never yields 'live'; always 'stale' with fallbackMode='json'
recovered-generation path rewrites computed 'live' to 'stale' with diagnostic GENERATION_COUNTER_RECOVERED
freshness cache keyed on resolve(workspaceRoot)+sourceSignature+generation; generation bump invalidates implicitly

Scorer weights are hardcoded Zod-literal constants (explicit_author=0.45, lexical=0.30, graph_causal=0.15, derived_generated=0.10, semantic_shadow=0.00); tuning requires code change + new promotion cycle
graph_causal lane is derived from union of explicit/lexical/derived matches (correlated, not independent); effective lane diversity is 3-lane for live scoring

Confidence function has 10+ branch-specific boosts (readOnlyExplainer, readOnlyRouteAllowed, derivedDominant+low-directScore, deepResearchCycle+skill-id, taskIntent+directScore, etc.) — hand-crafted, not learned
primaryIntentBonus applies 12+ hardcoded regex→skill-id bonuses (+0.35..+0.5) and penalties (-0.18..-0.25) as a second scoring pass after fusion; tight corpus-vocab↔skill-id coupling
Promotion bundle is 12 gates (not 7 as topic context claimed); two-consecutive-shadow-cycle rule is layered above the bundle in promotion/two-cycle-requirement.ts
Three quality gates are booleanized (ambiguity-stability, derived-lane-attribution-required, adversarial-stuffing-rejection) — hides regression magnitude, rewards false-true equally with noise-true
fallbackMode ('sqlite'|'json'|'none') is an orthogonal field from freshness state; topic documentation conflated the two, indicating cross-surface messaging drift

hypothesis 'edge detection is missing entire edge types' — ruled out: all 10 declared types are emitted. Real gap is detection QUALITY (regex CALLS) and coverage ANALYTICS (summary flattening), not detection existence
